studyName: A Phase II Clinical Trial of the PARP Inhibitor Talazoparib in BRCA1 and BRCA2 Wild-Type Patients

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, sequencing type, histological type, tumor status, primary or metastic tumor type, diagnosis year, collection year, homologous recombination deficiency (HRD) score and test success, adjuvant chemotherapy status and delivery (n=4 variables), platinum-based therapy (n=3 variables; adjuvant, metastatic, or any prior therapy), and line of metastatic therapy delivered (n=8 variables).

variables.name: ADJ_PLATINUM
variables.description: Did patient receive platinum-based therapy in adjuvant setting?

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: ANY_PRIOR_PLATINUM
variables.description: Did patient receive any platinum-based therapy in any setting prior to enrollment?

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: COLLECTION_DATE
variables.description: Date the sample was collected

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS_DATE
variables.description: Date patient was diagnosed with cancer

variables.name: HAD_PRIOR_ADJ_THERAPY
variables.description: Adjuvant chemotherapy or hormonal therapy was delivered

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: HRD_SCORE
variables.description: Homologous Recombination Deficiency score

variables.name: HRD_TESTED
variables.description: Was specimen tested for successfully HRD

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: METASTATIC_PLATINUM
variables.description: Did patient receive platinum-based therapy in metastatic setting?

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: PRIMARY_TUMOR_LOCATION
variables.description: Primary tumor location

variables.name: PRIOR_ADJ_SYSTEMIC_THERAPY_1
variables.description: First line of adjuvant therapy delivered

variables.name: PRIOR_ADJ_SYSTEMIC_THERAPY_2
variables.description: Second line of adjuvant therapy delivered

variables.name: PRIOR_ADJ_SYSTEMIC_THERAPY_3
variables.description: Third line of adjuvant therapy delivered

variables.name: PRIOR_SYSTEMIC_METASTATIC_THERAPY_1
variables.description: FIrst line of metastatic therapy delivered

variables.name: PRIOR_SYSTEMIC_METASTATIC_THERAPY_2
variables.description: Second line of metastatic therapy delivered

variables.name: PRIOR_SYSTEMIC_METASTATIC_THERAPY_3
variables.description: Third line of metastatic therapy delivered

variables.name: PRIOR_SYSTEMIC_METASTATIC_THERAPY_4
variables.description: Fourth line of metastatic therapy delivered

variables.name: PRIOR_SYSTEMIC_METASTATIC_THERAPY_5
variables.description: Fifth line of metastatic therapy delivered

variables.name: PRIOR_SYSTEMIC_METASTATIC_THERAPY_6
variables.description: Sixth line of metastatic therapy delivered

variables.name: PRIOR_SYSTEMIC_METASTATIC_THERAPY_7
variables.description: Seventh line of metastatic therapy delivered

variables.name: PRIOR_SYSTEMIC_METASTATIC_THERAPY_8
variables.description: Eight line of metastatic therapy delivered

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SEQ_TYPE
variables.description: Type of sequencing performed

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table includes subject's race, age, germline or tumor mutation used for study enrollment, tumor type, RECIST classication of best response and change in tumor measurements, homologous recombination deficiency (HRD) scores on primary and metastatic tumors, and time to progression and response to trial therapy.

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Subject age at enrollment

variables.name: BEST_CHANGE_SLD
variables.description: Percent change in sum of longest diameter (SLD) tumor measurements by RECIST

variables.name: BEST_RESPONSE
variables.description: RECIST classification of best response to talazoparib therapy on trial

variables.name: HRD_SCORE_METS
variables.description: Homologous Recombination Deficiency score on metastatic tumor

variables.name: HRD_SCORE_PRIMARY
variables.description: Homologous Recombination Deficiency score on primary tumor

variables.name: MUTATION
variables.description: Germline or tumor mutation used for study enrollment

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Self-reported race

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: TIME_TO_RESPONSE
variables.description: Time to response on trial therapy

variables.name: TTP
variables.description: Time to progression on trial therapy

variables.name: TUMOR_TYPE
variables.description: Tissue of origin of tumor

tables.description: The subject consent data table includes subject IDs and consent group information, and subject's biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
